meta.ogDesc: Quince leads on 47 pts after 102/104 matches

story: Quince leads on 47, but Sid is right on their shoulder — 2 back and sharpening the knives. Down at the bottom, Murray is nailed to the foot of the table on 23.

The cull. 46 teams are out — France (world-beaters one dressing-room row from civil war) the marquee casualty. Ellie and Quince still have the most skin in the game, 1 of six alive. Big Pewerk, Elsa, Etan, Ike, Murray and Sid are out cold, every last pick gone.
Next up, the final: Ellie's Spain v Quince's Argentina.
